pyqgis_plugin.name: M Design Suite
pyqgis_plugin.description: Suite of M Design tools for cable route planning and network design in Flanders
pyqgis_plugin.about: Includes design tool, design validation, external maps loader, image identify tool, and survey app. Built for network design workflows in Flanders, Belgium.
pyqgis_plugin.tags: Mdesign, design, validation, survey, network, WFS
